title: New Books Network: Incorruptible
summary: Richard Lucas interviews Eric for the New Books Network's Entrepreneurship & Leadership channel, calling it 'a vital framework for leaders aiming to build enduring, ethical, and successful organizations' and 'a conversation every entrepreneur, founder, and business leader needs to hear.'
blockquote: A vital framework for leaders aiming to build enduring, ethical, and successful organizations. This is a conversation every entrepreneur, founder, and business leader needs to hear.
